app_name: S.K. Sharma & Co. B2B Portal & ESS
personality: Fusion: 2 Material You structure + 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A premium, executive-level SaaS portal combining Material Design 3's responsive structure with the cinematic depth of glassmorphism and vivid blue/indigo accents, delivering a Zoho One/RazorpayX-level experience.

spacing.rule: Generous SaaS padding. Cards must never be flush to the edge. Dashboard widgets use md (12px) or lg (16px) gaps.

do's: Use rgba(255,255,255,0.7) with backdrop-filter: blur(12px) for light mode cards over subtle gradient backgrounds.
Use rgba(255,255,255,0.05) with backdrop-filter: blur(12px) and 1px border rgba(255,255,255,0.1) for dark mode cards.
Apply to sticky headers, bottom tab bars, and featured KPI dashboard cards.
dont's: Do not apply glassmorphism to dense data tables or deep nested form inputs.
Do not make text unreadable; always ensure solid contrast over the glass.

screens.name: Admin Dashboard
screens.purpose: A RazorpayX-style high-level executive snapshot for tracking KPI metrics, pending compliance, and payroll.

states.loading: Shimmer skeleton layout mimicking the grid structure of KPI cards and charts.
states.empty: Glassmorphic card with 'No data available' and a call to action.
states.error: Error card with a retry button centered on screen.

screens.layout: Header with global search and profile. Centralized grid for KPI cards (Total Clients, PF/ESIC Liability) with soft gradients. Horizontal scroll for Quick Actions. Interactive bar/line charts for Payroll Trend.

screens.name: Employee ESS Home
screens.purpose: A CRED-inspired, intuitive one-stop self-service portal for employees to punch in/out, view balance, and access payslips.

states.loading: Shimmer skeleton for the main attendance card and quick links.
states.empty: Illustration for 'No upcoming shifts or announcements'.
states.error: Error toast or full-page error state with retry.

screens.layout: Welcome Header (Good morning, [Name]). Main Glassmorphic Attendance Card (prominent Punch In/Out button, current time). 2-col grid for Quick Cards (Leave Balance, Payslip). Horizontal list for Announcements.

hero_background.alt: Abstract modern enterprise blue background for hero sections

instructions_to_main_agent: MANDATORY: Respect the user's explicit override for colors. Use Blue (#2563EB) and Indigo (#4338CA) as the primary brand colors.
Implement the 'midnight_dark' and a new 'azure_light' theme preset in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts, updating the ThemeColors object in-place to support these exact hex codes.
Ensure all cards use a border-radius of 16px (lg token).
Implement glassmorphism on the web using the `style={{ backdropFilter: 'blur(12px)' }}` prop since CSS files are not used. Use expo-blur for mobile targets.
Wrap interactive cards in Pressable with a scale(0.97) animation on press and a hover effect scaling to 1.02 on web.
For the Admin Portal: Layout the mobile footer navigation as Dashboard, Attendance, Payroll, Compliance, Reports, More.
For the Employee ESS: Layout the bottom navigation as Home, Attendance, Leave, Payslip, Profile.
Apply soft shadows: `shadowColor: '#000', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 4 }, shadowOpacity: 0.05, shadowRadius: 24` for light mode, slightly higher opacity for dark mode.
Implement loading skeletons using a shimmer effect (Reanimated) over surfaceTertiary blocks before data loads.
Use MaterialIcons as the primary icon set per the user's request.
